CustomField.description: API name of the text field on DataImport__c that stores the import status message for this object. The data import process writes success, failure, or match information to this field after processing each record.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Enter the API name of the Data Import field that will store the import status for this object (e.g., Contact1ImportStatus__c).
CustomField.label: Imported Record Status Field Name
